options.name: --projects
options.description: The directory containing the .csproj file or the path to the `.csproj` file. If not specified, a selection form will be displayed. (Default: null)

options.name: --output-class-name
options.description: The name of the generated class. (Default: @"WebPaths")

options.name: --output-path
options.description: Specifies the output destination for the generated code. (Default: @"./")

options.name: --force-export
options.description: Whether to overwrite the file if it already exists in the output destination. If not specified, confirmation will be prompted. (Optional)

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Whether to perform a dry run. If true, the code will not be generated. (Optional)
